Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. THE COURT MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE FOR THE RECORD. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled for insufficient service. Earliest date of hearing could be January 31, 2007. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
